text: 1) CHEMISTRY Short Answer Rank the following three acids from strongest to weakest: iodous acid, bromic acid, bromous acid.
label: TOSSUP_TEXT

text: ANSWER: BROMIC ACID, BROMOUS ACID, IODOUS ACID
label: TOSSUP_ANSWER
